title: tockPurchasedOption
description: tockPurchasedOption schema from Tock Reservation Model

id.description: A unique identifier for the option. Used internally by Tock.

name.description: The name assigned in the Tock Dashboard to this optional item.

amountCents.description: The amount added to the total price for just this one option purchased along with the experience.

posSku.description: If assigned by the business from the Tock Dashboard, this field will be the SKU denoting the option.
